# Boring Math Calculators - Full Reference

> Free online calculators for UK tax, personal finance, business, health, and everyday maths. All calculators run entirely in-browser with no signup, no data collection, and no cookies required for functionality. Built for UK users but many calculators work internationally.

## UK Tax & Finance Calculators

### UK Tax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-tax-calculator
Calculate take-home pay after income tax, National Insurance, and student loan deductions for any UK salary. Covers England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland with 2025/26 PAYE rates.
- Personal allowance: £12,570 (tapers above £100k)
- Basic rate: 20% (£12,571-£50,270)
- Higher rate: 40% (£50,271-£125,140)
- Additional rate: 45% (above £125,140)
- Employee NIC: 8% (£12,570-£50,270), 2% above
- Supports Scottish tax bands (19%-48%)
- Student loan Plan 1, 2, 4, 5 and postgraduate deductions
- Pension contribution modelling (salary sacrifice and relief at source)

### UK 100k Tax Trap Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-100k-tax-trap-calculator
Shows the 60% effective tax rate between £100,000 and £125,140 where personal allowance tapers. For every £2 earned above £100k, you lose £1 of personal allowance, creating an effective 60% marginal rate (40% tax + 20% lost allowance). The calculator models salary sacrifice strategies to stay below the threshold.

### UK Salary Sacrifice Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-salary-sacrifice-calculator
Compare take-home pay with and without salary sacrifice arrangements. Supports pension, cycle-to-work, childcare vouchers, and electric vehicle schemes. Shows income tax saved, employee NIC saved, employer NIC saved, true cost of benefit, and effective discount percentage. Handles personal allowance taper for £100k+ earners.

### UK Pension Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-pension-calculator
Project pension pot growth with employer and employee contributions. Models investment growth, charges, and retirement income. Shows shortfall analysis against target retirement income.

### UK Student Loan Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-student-loan-calculator
Model repayments for Plan 1, 2, 4, and 5 student loans. Shows monthly repayments, total amount repaid, interest accrued, and write-off date. Plan 2 interest is linked to RPI + up to 3% depending on income. Write-off: Plan 1 after 25 years, Plan 2 after 40 years, Plan 4 after 30 years, Plan 5 after 40 years.

### Contractor vs Employee Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/contractor-vs-employee-calculator
Side-by-side comparison of contractor day rates vs equivalent employee salaries. Accounts for employer NIC, pension, holiday, sick pay, and other employment costs. Shows the day rate needed to match an employee salary after accounting for all benefits.

### UK Dividend Tax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-dividend-tax-calculator
Calculate dividend tax liability for company directors and shareholders. 2025/26 rates: £500 dividend allowance, then 8.75% basic, 33.75% higher, 39.35% additional rate.

### UK Capital Gains Tax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-capital-gains-tax-calculator
Estimate CGT on property, shares, and other assets. 2025/26: £3,000 annual exempt amount. Residential property: 18%/24%. Other assets: 10%/20%.

### Inheritance Tax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/inheritance-tax-calculator
Estimate IHT liability. Nil-rate band: £325,000. Residence nil-rate band: £175,000. Rate: 40% above threshold. Includes taper relief for estates between £2M-£2.35M.

### UK Stamp Duty Calculator (England & NI)
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-stamp-duty-calculator
Calculate Stamp Duty Land Tax for residential property purchases. Bands: 0% up to £250,000, 5% £250,001-£925,000, 10% £925,001-£1.5M, 12% above £1.5M. First-time buyer relief: 0% up to £425,000.

### Stamp Duty Calculator Scotland
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/stamp-duty-calculator-scotland
Land and Buildings Transaction Tax (LBTT) for Scottish property. Bands differ from England.

### Stamp Duty Calculator Wales
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/stamp-duty-calculator-wales
Land Transaction Tax (LTT) for Welsh property purchases.

### SDLT Calculator (Additional Dwellings)
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/sdlt-calculator
Stamp duty for additional properties (second homes, buy-to-let). 5% surcharge on top of standard rates.

### Council Tax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/council-tax-calculator
Look up council tax bands and amounts by local authority area.

### UK Child Benefit Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-child-benefit-calculator
Calculate child benefit payments and High Income Child Benefit Charge. 2025/26: £26.05/week first child, £17.25/week additional children. HICBC applies when higher earner exceeds £60,000.

### UK Employer Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-employer-cost-calculator
Total cost of employing someone including employer NIC (13.8% above £5,000), workplace pension (minimum 3%), and other statutory costs.

### UK Nursery Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/uk-nursery-cost-calculator
Estimate childcare costs accounting for tax-free childcare (up to £2,000/year per child) and government-funded hours (15-30 hours depending on age and eligibility).

## Personal Finance Calculators

### Compound Interest Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/compound-interest-calculator
Model compound growth with regular contributions. Supports daily, monthly, quarterly, and annual compounding. Shows year-by-year breakdown of contributions vs growth.

### Savings Goal Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/savings-goal-calculator
Calculate how much to save monthly to reach a target amount by a target date, accounting for interest rate.

### FIRE Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/fire-calculator
Financial Independence / Retire Early projections. Models savings rate, investment returns, and safe withdrawal rate (typically 4%) to calculate your FIRE number and timeline.

### Debt Payoff Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/debt-payoff-calculator
Compare snowball (smallest balance first) and avalanche (highest interest first) debt repayment strategies. Shows total interest paid and payoff timeline for each method.

### Mortgage Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/mortgage-calculator
Calculate monthly mortgage payments, total interest, and full amortisation schedule for repayment mortgages.

### Buy vs Rent Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/buy-vs-rent-calculator
Compare long-term financial outcomes of buying vs renting. Factors in property appreciation, mortgage interest, maintenance, opportunity cost of deposit, and rent increases.

### Net Worth Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/net-worth-calculator
Track total assets minus liabilities across property, investments, savings, pensions, and debts.

### Emergency Fund Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/emergency-fund-calculator
Calculate recommended emergency fund size based on monthly expenses, income stability, and dependents. Generally 3-6 months of essential expenses.

### Inflation Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/inflation-calculator
Calculate purchasing power changes and inflation-adjusted values over time.

### Loan Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/loan-calculator
Monthly payments and total cost for any loan amount, interest rate, and term.

### Rental Property Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/rental-property-calculator
Analyse rental property investment returns including rental yield, cash flow, ROI, and capital appreciation.

## Business & Freelance Calculators

### Freelance Day Rate Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/freelance-day-rate-calculator
Convert annual salary to equivalent contractor day rate accounting for holidays, sick days, training, admin time, and self-employment costs.

### Consulting Rate Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/consulting-rate-calculator
Calculate consulting hourly and daily rates based on target annual income, billable hours, and overhead.

### Contractor vs Employee Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/contractor-vs-employee-calculator
Compare contractor day rates with equivalent employee salaries including all employment benefits and costs.

### Break Even Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/break-even-calculator
Find break-even point in units and revenue for products or services based on fixed costs, variable costs, and selling price.

### Pricing Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/pricing-calculator
Cost-plus and margin-based pricing for products and services.

### SaaS Metrics Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/saas-metrics-calculator
Calculate MRR, ARR, churn rate, LTV, CAC, and LTV:CAC ratio for subscription businesses.

### Startup Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/startup-cost-calculator
Estimate initial business setup costs across legal, technology, marketing, and operational categories.

### Side Hustle Profitability Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/side-hustle-profitability-calculator
Calculate true profitability of a side hustle after materials, time, platform fees, and tax.

### Employee Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/employee-cost-calculator
Total cost of employment including salary, benefits, taxes, equipment, and overhead.

### Etsy Fee Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/etsy-fee-calculator
Calculate Etsy selling fees including listing fee, transaction fee, payment processing, and shipping.

### Marketplace Fees Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/marketplace-fees-calculator
Compare fees across Amazon, eBay, Etsy, and other marketplace platforms.

### Go Full Time Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/go-full-time-calculator
Determine if your side business can replace your full-time income accounting for benefits, taxes, and stability.

## US Tax Calculators

### US Tax Bracket Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/us-tax-bracket-calculator
Federal income tax brackets and effective tax rate for US taxpayers.

### US Paycheck Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/us-paycheck-calculator
Calculate take-home pay after federal tax, state tax, Social Security, and Medicare.

### W2 to 1099 Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/w2-to-1099-calculator
Convert W2 employee hourly rate to equivalent 1099 contractor rate.

### US Self-Employment Tax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/us-self-employment-tax-calculator
Calculate self-employment tax (Social Security + Medicare) for freelancers and sole proprietors.

### US Quarterly Tax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/us-quarterly-tax-calculator
Estimate quarterly estimated tax payments for self-employed individuals.

### US Capital Gains Tax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/us-capital-gains-tax-calculator
Short-term and long-term capital gains tax rates based on filing status and income.

### 401k Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/401k-calculator
Project 401k retirement savings with employer match, contribution limits, and investment growth.

### HSA Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/hsa-calculator
Health Savings Account contribution limits, tax savings, and investment growth projections.

## Health & Wellness Calculators

### BMI Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/bmi-calculator
Body Mass Index calculation with category classification.

### Body Fat Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/body-fat-calculator
Estimate body fat percentage using multiple measurement methods.

### Calorie Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/calorie-calculator
Daily calorie needs based on age, gender, weight, height, and activity level.

### TDEE Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/tdee-calculator
Total Daily Energy Expenditure for meal planning and weight management.

### Macro Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/macro-calculator
Calculate protein, carbohydrate, and fat targets based on goals.

### Sleep Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/sleep-calculator
Optimal bedtime and wake time based on sleep cycles (90-minute intervals).

### Due Date Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/due-date-calculator
Estimate pregnancy due date from last menstrual period or conception date.

### Ovulation Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/ovulation-calculator
Predict fertile window and ovulation date based on cycle length.

### Dog Age Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/dog-age-calculator
Convert dog years to human years using breed-specific ageing rates.

### Age Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/age-calculator
Calculate exact age in years, months, and days between two dates.

## Home & DIY Calculators

### Paint Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/paint-calculator
Calculate paint needed for a room based on dimensions, coats, and paint coverage.

### Flooring Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/flooring-calculator
Calculate flooring material needed including waste factor.

### Tile Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/tile-calculator
Calculate tiles needed for floors or walls with grout spacing and waste.

### Fence Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/fence-calculator
Materials needed for fence construction including posts, panels, and concrete.

### Mulch Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/mulch-calculator
Calculate mulch volume needed for garden beds based on area and desired depth.

### Solar Panel Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/solar-panel-calculator
Estimate solar panel system size, cost, and savings based on energy usage and location.

### Electricity Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/electricity-cost-calculator
Calculate running cost of electrical appliances based on wattage, usage hours, and electricity rate.

### EV vs Gas Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/ev-vs-gas-calculator
Compare total cost of ownership between electric and petrol/diesel vehicles.

## Event & Party Calculators

### Wedding Alcohol Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/wedding-alcohol-calculator
Calculate wine, beer, and spirits needed for a wedding based on guest count, drinking habits, and event duration. Adjustable drink type percentages that auto-balance to 100%.

### Wedding Budget Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/wedding-budget-calculator
Plan wedding budget across venue, catering, photography, flowers, and all other categories.

### BBQ Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/bbq-calculator
Calculate meat and sides needed per person for a barbecue event.

### Party Drink Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/party-drink-calculator
Estimate drinks needed for any party based on guest count and duration.

### Birthday Party Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/birthday-party-calculator
Budget planning for birthday parties including venue, food, decorations, and entertainment.

### Graduation Party Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/graduation-party-calculator
Plan graduation celebration budget and supplies.

### Holiday Dinner Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/holiday-dinner-calculator
Calculate food quantities for holiday dinners based on guest count.

### Catering Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/catering-calculator
Estimate catering quantities and costs for events.

### Event Seating Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/event-seating-calculator
Plan seating arrangements for events based on room dimensions and table types.

### Conference Room Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/conference-room-calculator
Calculate conference room capacity for different seating arrangements.

## Utility Calculators

### Percentage Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/percentage-calculator
Calculate percentages, percentage change, and percentage of a number.

### Discount Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/discount-calculator
Calculate sale prices and savings with single or stacked discounts.

### Tip Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/tip-calculator
Calculate tip amount and split bills between multiple people.

### Unit Converter
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/unit-converter
Convert between metric and imperial units for length, weight, volume, and temperature.

### Currency Converter
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/currency-converter
Convert between major world currencies using current exchange rates.

### Time Zone Converter
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/time-zone-converter
Convert times between different time zones worldwide.

### GPA Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/gpa-calculator
Calculate Grade Point Average from course grades and credit hours.

## Brewing & Craft Calculators

### ABV Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/abv-calculator
Calculate alcohol by volume from original and final gravity readings.

### IBU Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/ibu-calculator
Calculate International Bitterness Units for homebrew recipes.

### Mash Water Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/mash-water-calculator
Calculate strike water volume and temperature for all-grain brewing.

### Priming Sugar Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/priming-sugar-calculator
Calculate priming sugar needed for bottle conditioning beer.

### Yeast Pitch Rate Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/yeast-pitch-rate-calculator
Calculate optimal yeast cell count for fermentation.

### Lye Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/lye-calculator
Calculate sodium hydroxide needed for cold process soap making.

### Fragrance Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/fragrance-calculator
Calculate fragrance oil percentages for candles and soap.

### Candle Wax Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/candle-wax-calculator
Calculate wax needed for candle making based on container dimensions.

### Glaze Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/glaze-calculator
Calculate ceramic glaze recipe quantities.

### Clay Shrinkage Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/clay-shrinkage-calculator
Calculate clay shrinkage percentage from wet to fired dimensions.

## Engineering Calculators

### Ideal Gas Law Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/ideal-gas-law-calculator
Solve PV=nRT for any variable given the other three.

### Reynolds Number Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/reynolds-number-calculator
Calculate Reynolds number for fluid flow to determine laminar vs turbulent flow.

### Pipe Flow Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/pipe-flow-calculator
Calculate flow rate, velocity, and pressure in pipes.

### Pressure Drop Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/pressure-drop-calculator
Calculate pressure drop in piping systems.

### LMTD Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/lmtd-calculator
Log Mean Temperature Difference for heat exchanger design.

### Speeds and Feeds Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/speeds-feeds-calculator
Calculate CNC machining speeds and feed rates.

### Tap Drill Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/tap-drill-calculator
Find correct drill size for tapped holes.

### Tool Deflection Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/tool-deflection-calculator
Calculate cutting tool deflection for CNC machining.

### Cutting Time Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/cutting-time-calculator
Estimate CNC machining cycle time.

## Aquarium & Pet Calculators

### Fish Stocking Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/fish-stocking-calculator
Calculate appropriate fish stocking levels for aquarium size.

### Water Change Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/water-change-calculator
Calculate water change volumes and frequency for aquariums.

### EI Dosing Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/ei-dosing-calculator
Calculate Estimative Index fertiliser dosing for planted aquariums.

### Pet Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/pet-cost-calculator
Estimate annual and lifetime costs of pet ownership.

### Baby Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/baby-cost-calculator
Estimate first-year and ongoing costs of having a baby.

## Other Calculators

### CO2 Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/co2-calculator
Calculate personal carbon footprint from travel, energy, and lifestyle.

### Vacation Budget Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/vacation-budget-calculator
Plan travel budget across flights, accommodation, food, and activities.

### Moving Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/moving-cost-calculator
Estimate costs of moving house including removals, deposits, and fees.

### Remote Work Savings Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/remote-work-savings-calculator
Calculate money saved by working from home vs commuting.

### Subscription Audit Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/subscription-audit-calculator
Track and analyse monthly subscription spending.

### Job Offer Comparison Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/job-offer-comparison-calculator
Compare total compensation packages including salary, benefits, pension, and perks.

### Hourly to Salary Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/hourly-to-salary-calculator
Convert hourly wage to annual salary and vice versa.

### Salary to Hourly Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/salary-to-hourly-calculator
Convert annual salary to equivalent hourly rate based on working hours.

### Overtime Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/overtime-calculator
Calculate overtime pay at time-and-a-half or double-time rates.

### Raise Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/raise-calculator
Calculate the impact of a pay raise on annual and monthly income.

### College ROI Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/college-roi-calculator
Compare return on investment of different university degrees.

### Ads Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/ads-calculator
Calculate advertising metrics: CPC, CPM, CTR, ROAS, and conversion rates.

### EU Salary Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/eu-salary-calculator
Compare salaries across European countries accounting for tax and cost of living.

### EU VAT Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/eu-vat-calculator
Calculate VAT amounts for EU member states at standard and reduced rates.

### Batch Cost Calculator
URL: https://boring-math.com/calculators/batch-cost-calculator
Calculate per-unit cost for batch production runs.

---

## About

Boring Math Calculators (boring-math.com) is a free calculator site focused on making everyday maths accessible. All calculations run client-side in the browser. No data is sent to any server. No account required. The site is built with Astro and Preact, hosted on Cloudflare Pages.

## Contact
Website: https://boring-math.com
Contact: https://boring-math.com/contact
